bug_fix_report.reproduction: Replace the test's fixed 200 ms sleep with a condition-based wait on the observable completion event; this deterministically reproduces the missing wake-up whenever the worker registers after the queue transition.
bug_fix_report.root_cause: Listener registration can occur after the one-shot completion transition, causing the wake-up to be lost.
confirming_evidence: All captured failures checked 8–47 ms before worker completion, while passing runs happened to complete within 200 ms.
With the ordering fix, the stabilized reproduction passed 500 consecutive runs.
With only the ordering fix removed, the stabilized test failed within 12 runs with the same missing wake-up.
bug_fix_report.fix_boundary: Change only the worker registration ordering so the listener exists before the transition; leave production behavior otherwise unchanged, keep the condition-based test wait, and remove the fixed sleep.
bug_fix_report.regression_protection: Keep the condition-based test and require repeated stabilized runs; hand it to pc-tdd.

debug_journal.hypothesis: Failing runs check for export completion before the worker completes.
debug_journal.prediction: Failure timestamps will show the assertion occurring before worker completion.
debug_journal.experiment: Instrument event enqueue and worker completion timestamps without changing the wait.
debug_journal.result: All captured failures checked 8–47 ms before completion; passing runs happened to complete inside 200 ms.

debug_journal.hypothesis: A condition-based wait will stabilize the race and reveal whether the completion event is eventually emitted.
debug_journal.prediction: Removing the fixed sleep will expose a missing wake-up whenever the worker registers after the queue transition.
debug_journal.experiment: Replace the fixed 200 ms sleep with a condition-based wait on the observable completion event, leaving production code unchanged.
debug_journal.result: The stabilized test reproduced a missing wake-up whenever the worker registered after the queue transition.

debug_journal.hypothesis: Registering the listener before the transition prevents the lost wake-up.
debug_journal.prediction: The stabilized reproduction will pass consistently with only the registration ordering changed and fail again when that change is removed.
debug_journal.experiment: Change only the worker registration ordering, run the stabilized test repeatedly, then remove only the ordering fix and repeat.
debug_journal.result: With the fix, 500/500 stabilized runs passed; with only the fix removed, the same missing wake-up returned within 12 runs.
